experiment_10.Task: Replay a local ChIP-seq workflow in Galaxy and compare its outputs against a completed baseline workflow.
experiment_10.Prompt: I need to know whether rerunning a local ChIP-seq workflow in Galaxy reproduces a previously completed baseline workflow. Use the attached manifest to fetch the paired-end inputs and workflow reference, run the workflow, compare the final outputs to the baseline, and report whether the results are equivalent along with the baseline alignment rate and the local peak-count difference.
